name_zh: 亚得里亚海八爪鱼沙拉
description_hr: Svježa **jadranska hobotnica** s krumpirom, kapulom, peršinom i domaćim maslinovim uljem.
description_en: Fresh **Adriatic octopus** with potatoes, onions, parsley, and homemade olive oil.
description_zh: 新鲜**亚得里亚海八爪鱼**配马铃薯、洋葱、欧芹和自制橄榄油。

description_hr: Tradicionalno jelo od **blitve**, mlade kapule i peršina u tankom tijestu, pečeno na kominu.
description_en: Traditional **chard-filled** savory pie with spring onions and parsley, baked on an open hearth.
description_zh: 传统**甜菜根**春葱香菜馅饼，在开放式壁炉上烤制而成。

description_hr: Bogata plata s roštilja: **ćevapi, pljeskavica, ražnjići, carsko meso i domaće kobasice**, posluženi s pomfritom i lukom.
description_en: A rich grill platter: **ćevapi, pljeskavica, pork skewers, pork belly, and domestic sausages**, served with fries and onions.
description_zh: 丰盛的烤肉拼盘：**烤肉卷（Ćevapi）、肉饼（Pljeskavica）、猪肉串、五花肉和本地香肠**，配薯条和洋葱。

name_zh: 传统克罗地亚烤肉卷配口袋饼
description_hr: Domaći **ćevapi od mljevene junetine** u toplom somunu s kajmakom i ajvarom.
description_en: Homemade **minced beef grilled rolls** in warm somun flatbread, served with kajmak cream and ajvar.
description_zh: 热口袋饼夹自制**烤牛肉卷**，配凯马克干酪（Kajmak）和爱瓦尔辣酱（Ajvar）。

description_hr: Velika **pljeskavica punjena sirom** s roštilja, poslužena s mladim krumpirom i lukom.
description_en: Large grilled beef **patty stuffed with cheese**, served with baby potatoes and onions.
description_zh: 内嵌**奶酪的大块烤牛肉饼**，配小土豆和洋葱。

name_en: Grilled Sea Bass or Sea Bream
name_zh: 香烤海鲈鱼 or 金头鲷
description_hr: Svježi cijeli **brancin ili orada** na žaru s dalmatinskim prilogom (blitva na lešo s krumpirom).
description_en: Fresh whole **sea bass or sea bream** grilled over embers, served with Dalmatian style chard and potatoes.
description_zh: 碳火香烤整条新鲜**海鲈鱼或金头鲷**，配达尔马提亚风味马铃薯拌甜菜。

description_hr: Sočni **svinjski ražnjići** s roštilja s grilanim povrćem i ajvarom.
description_en: Juicy grilled **pork skewers** served with grilled vegetables and ajvar.
description_zh: 鲜嫩炭烤**小猪肉串**，配烤蔬菜和爱瓦尔辣酱。

description_hr: **Tradicionalna bistra goveđa juha** od sporo kuhanog junećeg i goveđeg mesa s korjenastim povrćem. Poslužuje se s ručno kosanim *domaćim rezancima od jetrica* i svježim peršinom.
description_en: **Traditional clear beef broth** slowly simmered with root vegetables. Served with hand-pressed *house-made liver noodles* and fresh parsley.
description_zh: **传统清牛肉汤**，加入根茎蔬菜慢火熬制。配以手作*自制肝泥面*和新鲜欧芹。

name_hr: Juha od vrganja u krušnoj zdjelici
name_en: Porcini Mushroom Soup in a Bread Bowl
description_hr: **Gusta i kremasta juha** od mirisnih šumskih vrganja, obogaćena s malo vrhnja i svježim začinskim biljem. Poslužena na jedinstven način u *jestivoj zdjelici od svježe pečenog kruha*.
description_en: **Rich and creamy soup** made from aromatic wild porcini mushrooms, finished with cream and fresh herbs. Served in a *freshly baked edible bread bowl*.
description_zh: **浓郁奶油牛肝菌汤**，精选野生牛肝菌配以新鲜香草，装在*刚出炉的食用面包碗*中盛装。

description_hr: **Domaći ukiseljeni kupus** pripremljen prema tradicionalnoj recepturi. Hrskav, blago kiselkast i začinjen s malo domaćeg ulja i papra - *savršen zimski klasik*.
description_en: **Traditional house-pickled cabbage** prepared according to a time-honored recipe. Crisp, tangy, and dressed with local oil and pepper - *a perfect classic side*.
description_zh: 根据传统秘方**自制腌酸卷心菜**。爽脆微酸，伴有当地油脂和胡椒调味——*完美的经典配菜*。

description_hr: **Domaća cikla** marinirana u blagom octu sa začinima. Bogata okusom, blago slatkasta i iznimno osvježavajuća.
description_en: **House-pickled red beets** marinated in a mild seasoned vinegar. Rich in flavor, slightly sweet, and extremely refreshing.
description_zh: **自制腌红甜菜根**，浸泡在温和调味的醋汁中。风味浓郁，略带清甜，非常清爽解腻。

description_hr: **Salata od sočne domaće rajčice** narezane na ploške, posute svježim sjeckanim lukom i peršinom. Sve je začinjeno *ekstra djevičanskim maslinovim uljem* i našim *domaćim kvasinama*.
description_en: **Juicy local tomato salad** sliced and sprinkled with fresh chopped onions and parsley. Dressed with *extra virgin olive oil* and our *in-house fermented wine vinegar*.
description_zh: **多汁本地番茄沙拉**切片，撒上新鲜洋葱碎和欧芹。淋上*特级初榨橄榄油*和*自制红酒醋*。

description_hr: **Osvježavajući klasik** s kockicama svježe rajčice, paprike, krastavaca i luka, obilno posut ribanim *feta sirom*. Začinjen kapljicama ekstra djevičanskog maslinovog ulja i domaćeg octa.
description_en: **Refreshing classic salad** featuring diced fresh tomatoes, peppers, cucumbers, and onions, generously topped with grated *feta cheese*. Dressed with extra virgin olive oil and house vinegar.
description_zh: **经典清爽沙拉**，配以切丁的新鲜番茄、青椒、黄瓜 and 洋葱，上面铺满浓郁的*费塔奶酪碎*。淋上特级初榨橄榄油和自制醋。

description_hr: **Tanko rezani svježi krastavci** u bogatom umaku od domaćeg kiselog vrhnja, začinjeni sa sitno sjeckanim *češnjakom* i crvenom paprikom za savršen balans.
description_en: **Thinly sliced fresh cucumbers** in a rich sour cream dressing, seasoned with finely minced *garlic* and a touch of sweet paprika.
description_zh: **切成薄片的新鲜黄瓜**拌入浓郁的酸奶油酱中，用细碎的*大蒜* and 少许甜红椒粉调味。

description_hr: **Svinjski kotleti na žaru** marinirani u domaćem začinskom bilju i polagano pečeni na drvenom ugljenu. Poslužuju se sočni uz luk i ajvar.
description_en: **Grilled pork chops** marinated in local herbs and slowly grilled over wood embers. Served juicy with onions and ajvar.
description_zh: **香烤猪排**，用当地香草腌制，在木炭上慢火烤制。肉汁丰富，配以洋葱和爱瓦尔辣酱。

description_hr: **Vrhunski svinjski lungić** punjen domaćom šunkom i topljenim sirom, omotan u hrskavu slaninu i pečen na roštilju. *Pravi gastronomski užitak*.
description_en: **Premium pork tenderloin** stuffed with local ham and melted cheese, wrapped in crispy bacon and grilled. *A true culinary delight*.
description_zh: **特级猪里脊肉**，包裹着当地火腿和融化的奶酪，外面裹上脆皮培根后烤制。*真正的美食享受*。

name_zh: 克罗地亚风味家常汉堡
description_hr: **Domaća pljeskavica** od stopostotne junetine u svježe pečenom somunu, poslužena s kajmakom, svježim lukom i rajčicom. Spoj tradicije i burger kulture.
description_en: **Homemade 100% beef patty** served in a freshly baked somun flatbread, topped with kajmak cream, fresh onions, and tomatoes.
description_zh: **自制100%纯牛肉饼**，夹在刚出炉的口袋饼（Somun）中，配以凯马克干酪（Kajmak）、新鲜洋葱和番茄。

description_hr: **Najmekši dio junećeg bifteka** pečen na roštilju prema Vašoj želji. Poslužuje se s aromatiziranim maslacem od začinskog bilja.
description_en: **The tenderest cut of beef tenderloin** grilled to your preference. Served with aromatic homemade herb butter.
description_zh: **最嫩的牛里脊肉**，根据您的喜好烤制。配以香气铺鼻的自制香草黄油。

description_hr: **Svježa jadranska orada** pečena na žaru s maslinovim uljem, poslužena uz tradicionalnu dalmatinsku blitvu s krumpirom.
description_en: **Fresh Adriatic sea bream** grilled over embers with olive oil, served with traditional Dalmatian chard and potatoes.
description_zh: **新鲜亚得里亚金头鲷**，淋上橄榄油碳火慢烤，配以传统的达尔马提亚风味马铃薯拌甜菜。

description_hr: **Svježi jadranski brancin** pečen na roštilju, poslužen s preljevom od češnjaka, peršina i maslinovog ulja uz prilog od kuhane blitve i krumpira.
description_en: **Fresh Adriatic sea bass** grilled to perfection, dressed with a garlic, parsley, and olive oil mixture, served with boiled chard and potatoes.
description_zh: **新鲜亚得里亚海鲈鱼**烤至完美，淋上大蒜、欧芹和橄榄油的特调酱汁，配以水煮甜菜和马铃薯。

description_hr: **Aromatizirana riža** kuhana s obiljem svježeg sezonskog povrća (rajčica, paprika, tikvice) u bogatom domaćem umaku. *Tradicionalan i ukusan prilog ili samostalno jelo*.
description_en: **Aromatic rice** simmered with fresh seasonal vegetables (tomatoes, peppers, zucchini) in a rich homemade sauce. *A delicious traditional side or main dish*.
description_zh: **香气四溢的米饭**，加入新鲜时令蔬菜（番茄、彩椒、西葫芦）在浓郁的自制酱汁中慢火炖制。*美味的传统配菜或主食*。

description_hr: **Tradicionalno zagorsko jelo** od tankog vučenog tijesta punjenog svježim kravljim sirom, prelijevano vrhnjem i zapečeno u pećnici dok ne poprimi zlatnu boju.
description_en: **Traditional Zagorje dish** made of thin pulled pastry filled with fresh cottage cheese, topped with cream and baked to a golden brown.
description_zh: **扎戈列传统面食**，由薄拉面皮包裹新鲜农家干酪，淋上鲜奶油，烤至金黄色。

description_hr: Cabbage
description_en: or Potato
description_zh: 传统千层咸饼（奶酪、卷心菜或土豆）
price: **Hrskavo vučeno tijesto** punjeno po Vašem izboru: blagim kravljim sirom, pirjanim kupusom ili začinjenim krumpirom. *Pečeno do savršene hrskavosti*.
image: **Crispy rolled pastry** filled with your choice of: mild cottage cheese, sauteed cabbage, or seasoned spiced potatoes. *Baked to golden crispness*.
spicy_level: **金黄酥脆的千层饼**，可选择填料：温和农家干酪、清炒卷心菜或调味马铃薯。*烤至完美酥脆*。

description_hr: **Pološke krumpira** pečene u pećnici s komadićima luka, domaćom masti i začinima dok ne postanu zlatne i hrskave izvana, a meke iznutra.
description_en: **Potato slices** baked in the oven with onions, local lard, and herbs until golden and crispy on the outside, and tender on the inside.
description_zh: **马铃薯片**与洋葱、当地猪油和香草一起在烤箱中烘烤，直到外表金黄酥脆，内部鲜嫩。

description_hr: **Zlatni i hrskavi krumpirići**, prženi do savršenstva i blago posoljeni. *Omiljeni klasik za sve generacije*.
description_en: **Golden and crispy French fries**, fried to perfection and lightly salted. *A beloved classic for all generations*.
description_zh: **金黄酥脆的炸薯条**，炸至完美并微盐调味。*深受各代人喜爱的经典小食*。

name_zh: 达尔马提亚甜菜马铃薯
description_hr: **Kuhani listovi svježe blitve** i krumpir, začinjeni domaćim ekstra djevičanskim maslinovim uljem i sitno sjeckanim *češnjakom*. *Najpoznatiji dalmatinski prilog*.
description_en: **Boiled fresh Swiss chard** and potatoes, dressed with domestic extra virgin olive oil and minced *garlic*. *The most famous Dalmatian side dish*.
description_zh: **水煮新鲜瑞士甜菜**和马铃薯，拌入当地特级初榨橄榄油和碎*大蒜*。*最著名的达尔马提亚风味配菜*。

name_zh: 克雷姆什尼特吉士奶油蛋糕
description_hr: **Kultni samoborski desert** s bogatom, laganom kremom od jaja i pjenastim šlagom između dvije kore prhkog lisnatog tijesta, posut šećerom u prahu.
description_en: **Iconic custard cream cake** featuring a rich yet light egg custard and whipped cream layered between two crispy sheets of puff pastry, dusted with powdered sugar.
description_zh: **标志性吉士奶油蛋糕**，在两层酥脆的千层酥皮之间夹入浓郁而轻盈的鸡蛋吉士酱 and 鲜奶油，最后撒上糖粉。

description_hr: **Klasik francuske kuhinje** - preokrenuti kolač s karameliziranim jabukama na prhkom tijestu. Poslužuje se topao uz kuglicu sladoleda od vanilije.
description_en: **French pastry classic** - upside-down tart with caramelized apples on a buttery crust. Served warm with a scoop of vanilla ice cream.
description_zh: **法式经典糕点**——在黄油饼底上铺满焦糖苹果的反转苹果塔。温热上桌，配上一勺香草冰淇淋。

description_hr: **Slatka verzija tradicionalnog bureka** s bogatim nadjevom od pirjanih kiselkastih jabuka, cimeta i šećera, umotana u hrskavo lisnato tijesto.
description_en: **A sweet version of traditional burek** filled with sautéed tart apples, cinnamon, and sugar, wrapped in crispy rolled pastry sheets.
description_zh: **传统千层饼的甜味版**，填入清炒酸苹果、肉桂和糖，用酥脆的千层饼皮包裹烘烤。

description_hr: **Klasična napuljska pizza** s umakom od rajčice, svježom *mozzarellom*, maslinovim uljem i svježim listićima bosiljka.
description_en: **Classic Neapolitan pizza** with tomato sauce, fresh *mozzarella*, olive oil, and fresh basil leaves.
description_zh: **经典那不勒斯披萨**，配番茄酱、新鲜*马苏里拉奶酪*、橄榄油和新鲜罗勒叶。

description_hr: **Gastronomski ponos kuće** - pizza posložena u obliku hrvatskog grba s poljima od pikantne *slavonske kobasice* i pršuta naspram nježnog bijelog *kozjeg sira*. Zaokruženo crnim maslinama.
description_en: **The culinary pride of the house** - a pizza arranged in the pattern of the Croatian coat of arms, featuring alternating checkers of spicy *Slavonian sausage* and prosciutto against mild white *goat cheese*. Finished with black olives.
description_zh: **本店招牌美食**——披萨呈克罗地亚国徽图案排列，红白相间的格子里填满香辣*斯拉沃尼亚香肠*和普修托火腿，与温和的白*山羊奶酪*相得益彰，并点缀黑橄榄。

description_hr: **Bogata domaća pizza** s umakom od rajčice, sirom, pikantnim *kulenom*, pancetom, ljutim feferonima i obilnim žlicama svježeg *kiselog vrhnja*. *Za ljubitelje pikantnih okusa*.
description_en: **Rich domestic pizza** with tomato sauce, cheese, spicy *kulen* sausage, bacon, hot pepperoni, and dollops of fresh *sour cream*. *For lovers of fiery flavors*.
description_zh: **富庶的当地披萨**，配番茄酱、奶酪、香辣*库伦香肠*、培根、辣椒和新鲜的*酸奶油*。*香辣口味爱好者者的福音*。

description_hr: **Omiljeni klasik** s umakom od rajčice, topljenim sirom, finom *kuhanom šunkom* i svježim šampinjonima iz uzgoja.
description_en: **A popular classic** with tomato sauce, melted cheese, fine *cooked ham*, and fresh cultivated mushrooms.
description_zh: **备受喜爱的经典**披萨，配番茄酱、融化的奶酪、精选*熟火腿*和新鲜培育的双孢菇。

description_hr: **Šareni vrt na tijestu** - umak od rajčice, sir, grilane tikvice, paprika, kukuruz šećerac, rajčice i svježa *divlja rikola*.
description_en: **A colorful garden on dough** - tomato sauce, cheese, grilled zucchini, bell peppers, sweet corn, cherry tomatoes, and fresh wild arugula.
description_zh: **面饼上的缤纷花园**——番茄酱、奶酪、香烤西葫芦、彩椒、甜玉米、樱桃番茄和新鲜野生芝麻菜。

description_hr: **Jedinstveni spoj roštilja i pizze** - tanko tijesto prekriveno sirom, komadićima sočnih *ćevapa*, crvenim lukom, a nakon pečenja premazano bogatim *kajmakom* i ajvarom.
description_en: **A unique fusion of grill and pizza** - thin crust topped with cheese, juicy chunks of *ćevapi*, red onions, finished with rich *kajmak cream* and ajvar.
description_zh: **烤肉与披萨的独特融合**——薄面饼上铺满奶酪、多汁的*克罗地亚烤肉卷（Ćevapi）碎*和红洋葱，出炉后抹上浓郁的*凯马克奶酪（Kajmak）*和爱瓦尔辣酱。

description_hr: **Gourmet riblja pizza** s blagim bijelim umakom, sirom, tankim listićima *dimljenog lososa*, kaparima i osvježavajućim koprom.
description_en: **Gourmet seafood pizza** with a mild white sauce, cheese, thin slices of *smoked salmon*, capers, and refreshing dill.
description_zh: **美食家海鲜披萨**，配温和白酱、奶酪、熏三文鱼薄片、马刺齿乳香黄连木和清爽莳萝。

name_zh: 普修托火腿西瓜创意披萨
description_hr: **Odvažna ljetna kreacija** s umakom od rajčice, mozzarellom i slanim *jadranskim pršutom*, poslužena uz kockice slatke, hladne *svježe lubenice* i pokapana acetom balsamicom.
description_en: **A bold summer creation** with tomato sauce, mozzarella, and salty *adriatic prosciutto*, topped with cubes of sweet, chilled *fresh watermelon* and drizzled with balsamic glaze.
description_zh: **大胆的夏季创意**披萨，配番茄酱、马苏里拉奶酪和咸味*亚得里亚普修托火腿*，上面铺着清甜冰镇的*新鲜西瓜丁*，并淋上巴萨米克醋膏。

name_hr: Pizza s četiri vrste sira i grožđem
name_zh: 四式干酪配鲜葡萄披萨
description_hr: **Sklad slanog i slatkog** - bogata kombinacija *mozzarelle, gorgonzole, parmezana i paškog sira*, posuta bobicama svježeg *slatkog grožđa* i orasima.
description_en: **A harmony of sweet and savory** - a rich blend of *mozzarella, gorgonzola, parmesan, and Pag sheep's cheese*, topped with fresh *sweet grape* berries and walnuts.
description_zh: **甜咸交融的和谐风味**——*马苏里拉奶酪、戈贡佐拉蓝干酪、帕玛森奶酪和帕格羊奶酪*的浓郁组合，上面撒有新鲜的*甜葡萄*和核桃碎。

description_hr: **Lagana i osvježavajuća pizza** s umakom od rajčice, sirom, mladim šparogama, zelenim tikvicama, cherry rajčicama, svježim *mladim lukom* te mladim sirom.
description_en: **Light and refreshing spring pizza** with tomato sauce, cheese, baby asparagus, green zucchini, cherry tomatoes, fresh *spring onions*, and cottage cheese.
description_zh: **清爽轻盈的春季披萨**，配番茄酱、奶酪、嫩芦笋、绿西葫芦、樱桃番茄、新鲜*春葱*和农家奶酪。
